headline: Assessing NetApp (NTAP) Valuation After New Cyber Resilience Alliances With Elastio And Commvault
summary: Why NetApp’s latest cyber resilience moves matter for shareholders NetApp (NTAP) has drawn fresh attention after partnering with Elastio and Commvault to embed deeper ransomware detection and recovery into its storage services, directly targeting rising cyber risk around AI and cloud workloads. See our latest analysis for NetApp. Despite the recent cyber resilience partnerships with Elastio and Commvault, the share price has been choppy, with a 7 day share price return of a 3.28% decline and...
